rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Elec. Code §279.002, which governs election cybersecurity duties of the Secretary of State. The two provisions address entirely separate subject matters.
quote: The secretary of state shall adopt rules defining classes of protected election data and establishing best practices for identifying and reducing risk to the electronic use, storage, and transmission of election data and the security of election systems.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns election cybersecurity, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
